Notice Of Motion And Motion For Entry Of Consent Judgment; Proof Of Service
Off Calendar Jan-26-2018 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES: No appearances. The Court adopts the tentative ruling as follows:

PLAINTIFF AMY CHAMBERLAIN's Motion For Entry Of Consent Judgment is GRANTED. No opposition filed and the settlement complies with the Health and Safety Code. The court will execute the proposed order and proposed judgment.

Order and Consent Judgment signed. (see scanned order for details)

Judge: Richard B. Ulmer Jr., Clerk: M. Goodman, Court Reporter: Maria Torreano, CSR#8600, torreanom@aol.com; mtorreano@sftc.org, Reported. (D302/RU)
